title: elaeocarpus sylvestris var. lanyuensis
intro: Elaeocarpus sylvestris var. lanyuensis is a variety of the Elaeocarpus sylvestris plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is commonly known as Taiwanese blueberry ash, and its leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of Elaeocarpus sylvestris var. lanyuensis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
